overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a vast prairie landscape. The character travels along a dirt path, encountering a horse rider and a carriage along the way, with rocky mountains and a farmstead visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland approaching dirt trail

events.description: character steps from tall grass onto the dirt trail
rider on white horse passes by on the trail from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward and onto a dirt trail in the prairie

notable_agents.action: riding a white horse along the trail, passing the player character from right to left

entered.detail: large rocky outcrop and mountain range visible in the distant background
expansive green prairie with gentle rolling hills extending to the horizon
solitary oak trees dotting the prairie landscape
worn dirt path cutting through the grassland
wooden trail marker with directional signs at a path intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a cowboy walking through tall prairie grass toward a dirt trail. Rocky mountains rise in the distant background while scattered oak trees dot the landscape. The character steps onto the trail around 6 seconds, and a rider on a white horse passes by at 9.5 seconds, traveling in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie dirt road through rolling hills

events.description: horse-drawn carriage approaches from ahead and passes the player

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through open prairie with farm buildings visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon traveling along the trail, overtaking the player character from ahead

entered.detail: cluster of wooden farm buildings and corrals visible on the horizon
weathered wooden fence lines marking property boundaries

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the dirt trail through the open prairie, with wooden fences appearing on the left and a distant farmstead coming into view ahead. Around 28 seconds, a horse-drawn carriage approaches from the distance and passes by. The rocky mountains shift to the center background as the path curves gently.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural farmstead with wooden barns and corrals

events.description: approaching and entering the farmstead area with wooden buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the path past wooden farm buildings, corrals, and abandoned wagons

entered.detail: large wooden barn structure with weathered planks and pitched roof
fenced livestock enclosure attached to the barn
derelict wooden wagon left in the grass near the farm

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the farmstead buildings that were previously distant, passing a large wooden barn and corral on the left. The trail curves slightly as it leads past abandoned wagons and weathered farm structures, with the rocky mountains remaining visible in the left background throughout the approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open prairie that gradually transitions into a rustic farmstead. It begins with a cowboy walking through tall grass toward a dirt trail, with scattered oak trees and rocky mountains framing the distant horizon. As the character steps onto the path, a rider on a white horse passes by in the opposite direction, and the landscape opens further to reveal wooden fences and a far-off farmstead. The scene then shifts as a horse-drawn carriage approaches and passes the character, while the trail curves gently to bring the rocky mountains into the center background. Finally, the camera leads the character directly into the farmstead, passing a large wooden barn, a corral, and weathered wagons as the mountains recede into the left background.
